name: Halloween Party Pops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cookie dough into about twenty 1/2-inch slices.
2. Roll each slice into a ball.
3. Arrange part of the balls in a circle on ungreased baking sheets, spacing them 3 inches apart and 2 inches from the edges.
4. Securely insert a wooden stick into each ball with the end pointing toward the center of the cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 14 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Cool for 2 minutes, then remove from the baking sheets.
7. Allow to cool completely on wire racks.
8. Frost or decorate as desired using ready-to-spread frosting (or your favorite homemade version).
- Decorate the cookies to make pumpkin faces, spider webs, and cat faces.
- Use assorted seasonal candy for eyes, mouth, whiskers, etc.
This is an old trick that never gets old—it's a hit with teens too. Festive and fun!
